user.title: Connect to Sipeed NanoKVM
user.description: Set up a Sipeed NanoKVM integration.

data.use_static_host: Use static host only (disable mDNS discovery)

auth.title: Authenticate to Sipeed NanoKVM
auth.description: Authenticate to your Sipeed NanoKVM device.

confirm.title: Discovered Sipeed NanoKVM
confirm.description: Do you want to set up the NanoKVM device named {name}?

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Sipeed NanoKVM
reauth_confirm.description: The NanoKVM integration needs updated credentials for {name}.

ssl_fingerprint.title: Verify SSL Certificate
ssl_fingerprint.description:
The NanoKVM device at **{host}** presented a self-signed certificate with the following SHA-256 fingerprint:

`{fingerprint}`

Do you trust this certificate?

ssl_fingerprint_changed.title: SSL Certificate Changed
ssl_fingerprint_changed.description:
The SSL certificate for the NanoKVM device at **{host}** has changed.

**Previous fingerprint:**
`{old_fingerprint}`

**New fingerprint:**
`{new_fingerprint}`

This could mean the device generated a new certificate, or that something is intercepting the connection. Only accept if you expect this change.
